created_by_slice: P92 Software Heritage Connector Runtime Planning v0
worktree_status: P92 artifacts generated after initial clean inspection.
runtime_boundary: P92 is planning-only. It does not implement the Software Heritage connector runtime, does not call Software Heritage APIs, does not resolve SWHIDs live, does not perform origin, visit, snapshot, release, revision, directory, or content lookups, does not fetch source files, content blobs, directories, source archives, Git remotes, or repositories, does not inspect or execute source code, does not run source sync jobs, write source-cache or evidence-ledger records, wire public search to live calls, enable arbitrary SWHID/origin/repository fetch, downloads, mirroring, credentials, tokens, or telemetry, and does not mutate public, local, runtime, candidate, source-cache, evidence-ledger, or master indexes.
connector_runtime_architecture_plan: future client.py bounded Software Heritage metadata client
future normalize.py source-cache Software Heritage summary normalizer
future evidence.py evidence observation candidate builder
source_sync_job_flow: Approved source sync job is selected.
Source policy guard checks connector approval.
SWHID/origin/repository identity guard validates approved identity source.
Source-code-content risk guard verifies metadata-only handling.
Token/auth guard verifies v0 is token-free unless future policy approves otherwise.
Connector performs bounded metadata-only request in future runtime.
Response is normalized to SWHID/origin/visit/snapshot/release/revision metadata summary.
Source cache record candidate is validated.
Evidence ledger observation candidate is built.
No public index/master index mutation occurs.
Failures produce bounded error records, not raw payload dumps.
swhid_origin_repository_review_normaliza: Allowed future identity sources are reviewed source records, reviewed search needs, source pack records, manual observation records, and fixture examples. Raw public query parameters, private repositories, credentialed repositories, local repository paths, localhost URLs, file URLs, uploaded files, arbitrary URLs, and unreviewed origin URLs are forbidden.
validation_normalization_plan: Validate response shape, SWHID syntax, object type, origin metadata, visit/snapshot/release/revision metadata, directory metadata summaries without content traversal, content identifier metadata without blob fetch, archival presence, dates, source attribution, error envelopes, raw payload exclusion, source-code content exclusion, content blob exclusion, directory content exclusion, repository clone exclusion, source archive exclusion, and private origin/repository redaction or rejection.
failure_retry_timeout_circuit_breaker_pl: Timeouts, bounded retries, retry-after/abuse-limit backoff, per-source rate limits, circuit breaker, no retry storms, no public-search blocking, no raw error leaks, connector disabled on policy violation, and operator-visible summaries are required.
public_search_boundary: Public search must not call Software Heritage live or accept arbitrary SWHID/origin/repository parameters for live fetch; future cards may only read reviewed public-safe summaries after separate runtime and review.
privacy_rights_risk_review: Software identity/archive metadata-only with SWHID, origin URL, repository identity, and source-code-content risk review; no private repositories, private origins, token-required access, content blob fetch, raw file fetch, directory traversal, source code download, source archive download, repository clone, origin crawl, source execution, downloads, mirroring, install, execute, credentials, private account access, rights clearance, license clearance, malware safety, source-code safety claim, source completeness claim, installability claim, or raw payload dumps.
security_abuse_review: Rate limits, timeout, circuit breaker, User-Agent/contact, token-free default, cache requirement, kill switch, no public fanout, SWHID/origin/repository identity guard, source-code-content guard, source policy guard, token/auth guard, and operator approval are required.

initial_inspection.summary: P76 approval pack and contracts were present; connector_approved_now is false; SWHID, origin URL, repository identity, source-code-content, token/auth, source policy, content/download/clone boundaries, and operator values are pending.

p92_plan_validation.summary: P92 validator and focused tests passed; readiness remains blocked_connector_approval_pending.

approval_and_ingestion_contracts.summary: Existing Software Heritage approval/contract, P87-P91 runtime plans, source sync, source cache, and evidence ledger contracts remained valid and planning/contract-only.

public_search_static_and_safety.summary: Local public-search safety/static lanes passed. No public-search runtime fanout or Software Heritage connector behavior was added.

hosted_deployment_and_baseline.summary: Hosted backend remains not configured, configured static route verification remains failed, and Manual Observation Batch 0 remains 0 observed / 39 pending.

evals_and_full_tests.summary: Archive evals passed 6/6. Search usefulness remains 64 queries with capability_gap=7, covered=5, partial=40, source_gap=10, unknown=2. Full Python/unit/boundary/diff lanes passed.

optional.summary: Optional gh and cargo commands were unavailable because the executables are not installed.

remaining_blockers: Connector approval remains pending because P76 keeps connector_approved_now false.
Origin URL policy review remains pending.
Repository identity policy review remains pending.
Software Heritage API/source policy review remains pending.
Source-code-content risk policy review remains pending.
Token/auth policy review remains pending; v0 remains token-free.
Rate-limit, timeout, retry, and circuit-breaker values are pending.
Source sync worker execution, source-cache runtime, and evidence-ledger runtime remain future.
Hosted deployment remains unverified for future public integration.
